title: vismia baccifera subsp. ferruginea
intro: Vismia baccifera subsp. ferruginea is a plant species, also known as the yellow sapote or yellow guanabana, that is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, and is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Vismia baccifera subsp. ferruginea include reducing inflammation and pain, treating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Vismia baccifera subsp. ferruginea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to make topical creams and ointments for wound healing and skin care.
